## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test/CI update
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pytest -q` locally
- [ ] I ran `flake8` locally
- [ ] I updated docs for behavior/interface changes
- [ ] I added/updated tests for changed behavior
